description: Wise mobile prototype — Make-specific overrides for base-surfaces-mobile

cssSourceTransforms.description: Fix flow overlay sizing — replace inset:0 with longhand + height:100% so flows fill df-screen-content exactly
Strip min-height: 100vh/100dvh from .flow-overlay — transform creates containing block, oversized overlay = offscreen buttons

fileReplacements.description: Neutralize WebGL liquid glass effect — Make sandbox restricts WebGL
Neutralize liquid glass touch animation — requires WebGL-level rendering
fileReplacements.content:
import { useRef } from 'react';
export function useLiquidGlass<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>() { return useRef<T>(null); }

fileReplacements.description: Bypass PinProtection auth gate — no env vars in Make

contentTransforms.description: Disable live rates fetching — no proxy in Make, keep fallback rates

dataInjections.description: Inject fresh exchange rates from Wise API at build time
